title: Soul Knight – The Ultimate Pixel Dungeon Shooter (Free Download)
summary:
All knights, it's time to assemble!
Join the multiplayer mode and play with friends across the world to defeat crazy monsters together! Whether you prefer an exclusive team of 2 players, or enjoy the thrill of a larger squad with 3 to 4 players, the fun of teamwork is guaranteed!
content:
🎮 Download Soul Knight — Latest Version (Free) | UnlockVault





Overview



Soul Knight is a fast-paced 2D action shooter that mixes roguelike elements with dungeon-crawling fun. Enter randomized dungeons, collect powerful weapons, unlock quirky heroes, and face off against relentless enemies and bosses. Each run is different — that’s the charm.

---

Key Features



  • Over 400 weapons spanning swords, guns, and weird sci-fi contraptions.

  • Multiple playable characters, each with unique skills.

  • Local co-op mode — team up with friends over Wi-Fi.

  • Retro pixel art and fluid, responsive controls.

  • Frequent updates that add new events, heroes, and items.


---

Game Info



| Property | Details |
|---|---|

| Last updated | October 14, 2025 |

---

How to Play





1. Pick a hero (Knight, Mage, Rogue, etc.).
2. Enter the dungeon and fight waves of enemies.
3. Loot weapons, potions, and gold to boost your run.
4. Defeat the floor boss to progress — every run gets harder and more rewarding.

---

Download Links



  • 👉 Download Soul Knight (Android) — Google Play Store

  • 👉 Download Soul Knight (iOS) — App Store


---

Tips from UnlockVault



  • Experiment with different heroes — some weapons pair better with specific skills.

  • Save your coins for permanent upgrades between runs.

  • Invite a friend for co-op: surviving together is much easier and more fun.
